benefits.description: Early waking shortened and sleep extended; achieved 8 hours straight when dosed at 5pm at 200mcg

side_effects.description: Early waking and fragmented sleep returned when dose increased to 300mcg or dosed at 6:30pm; total sleep dropped back to 5 hours

protocol_notes: 62-year-old male (referred to as 'husband'). Epitalon at 200mcg dosed no later than 5pm. Combined with melatonin 0.5–1mg and L-Theanine 200mg. Had pre-existing early waking and sleep fragmentation prior to Retatrutide. Higher dose (300mcg) or later timing (6:30pm) worsened sleep. OP noted age as '62F' which appears to be a typo; interpreted as male based on context.
